description_long: This object is a small potted plant featuring a terracotta-colored pot with a faceted, polygonal shape and a matte finish. The pot is filled with dark soil, from which a single green plant emerges, displaying three broad, elongated leaves with visible veins. The leaves are arranged asymmetrically, with one leaf standing upright and the others arching outward, giving the plant a dynamic, natural appearance. The pot itself is plain, lacking any decorative patterns or textures, and the plant appears to be a young specimen, possibly a common houseplant. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban environments. No plant identification label or tag is visible on the pot or plant.
description: A small terracotta pot with dark soil holds a young green plant with three broad, veined leaves. The pot is plain and polygonal, and the plant is simple and natural in appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing three green leaves, with the central leaf upright and the others spreading outward from a plain terracotta pot.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated leaf extending to the right and the angled perspective of the polygonal pot.
description_view_2: Rear view with only the central upright leaf visible, and the pot's faceted shape clearly shown.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the arching leaves and the depth of the dark soil within the terracotta pot.
attribute_plant_species: generic houseplant (possibly Spathiphyllum or similar broadleaf)
